subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is the Purpose of the world, Who, notwithstanding the turning away of princes, the heedlessness of the learned, and the denial of the divines, hath caused knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم را لایق و سزا که مع اعراض امرا و اغماض علما و انکار فقها علم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
